Strictly dominated by deepseek-v4-flash:direct (DeepSeek native API at https://api.deepseek.com) on the canonical corpus (2026-05-23). The 2026-05-14 6/6 JSON-gate failures (character-level malformation, leaked </think> tags) and the #63.7-A4 live-compile failure on the Buffett source were caused by Alibaba's OpenAI-compatibility layer stripping or mis-routing 'response_format' for non-Qwen models, NOT a capability gap in deepseek-v4-flash itself (corrected diagnosis 2026-05-23, overturning the 2026-05-15 reasoning). Empirical proof: direct-route fire returned S0=1.000, M1-M5=1.000, M7=3578ms (2.75x faster than this entry's best historical 9830ms). The qwen3.6-flash 'control' on 2026-05-15 was misframed: it only proved Alibaba's native Qwen model survived its own routing, not that all models survive the compat layer. Keep dropped as audit trail of the routing-vs-capability investigation.
